_meta.description: Beyond Paradise destination profiles — region-level intelligence for East Africa + Southeast Asia

destinations.name: Zanzibar
destinations.description: Archipelago off Tanzania's coast. Stone Town (UNESCO World Heritage), pristine east coast beaches, marine biodiversity (dolphins, turtles, reef fish), and world-class luxury lodges.
destinations.avoid_reason: Long rains (March–May) — rough Indian Ocean, reduced marine visibility

entry_requirements.visa: Visa on arrival for most nationalities. USD 50 for most Europeans.
entry_requirements.health: Yellow fever certificate required if arriving from endemic country. Malaria prophylaxis recommended.

airports.name: Abeid Amani Karume International Airport
airports.connections: Direct from Dubai (flydubai), Nairobi, Dar es Salaam. No direct Europe flights — connect via NBO or DAR.

destinations.tim_notes: Zanzibar is the base — I live here. The east coast (Michamvi, Bwejuu, Matemwe) is quieter and more authentic than the north (Nungwi/Kendwa). Marine conditions dictate timing entirely — plan around the Indian Ocean seasons, not the calendar.

destinations.name: Serengeti
destinations.description: The world's most iconic safari destination. 15,000 km² of open savannah, the Great Migration of 2+ million animals, and year-round big cat viewing.
destinations.avoid_reason: Long rains (March–May) — some roads impassable, reduced game viewing

western-corridor.best_for: Grumeti migration crossings, Singita private concession

southern-ndutu.best_for: Calving season, cheetah, vast open plains

entry_requirements.visa: Tanzania visa required. e-Visa available. USD 50–100.
entry_requirements.health: Yellow fever if from endemic country. Malaria prophylaxis required.

airports.name: Seronera Airstrip (within park)
airports.connections: Charter flights from Arusha (ARK) or Kilimanjaro (JRO). No commercial service.

destinations.tim_notes: The debate is always: Western Corridor (Grumeti crossings, fewer vehicles) vs Mara crossings (larger herds, more vehicles). I prefer Grumeti — the private Singita concession means we often watch crossings with no other vehicles. The calving season (December–February, Ndutu) is criminally underrated — highest predator density I've seen anywhere.

destinations.name: Masai Mara
destinations.description: Kenya's most famous reserve. Famous for the annual wildebeest migration river crossings (July–October) and exceptional big cat concentrations year-round.
destinations.avoid_reason: Long rains peak — wettest month, difficult roads

public-reserve.best_for: Accessible, most wildlife, no off-road driving

entry_requirements.health: Malaria prophylaxis required. Yellow fever if from endemic country.

airports.name: Mara North (Kichwa Tembo) Airstrip
airports.connections: Scheduled and charter from Nairobi Wilson (WIL). 45 min.

destinations.tim_notes: The conservancy model is everything in the Mara. Public reserve = 40+ vehicles at a lion kill. Olare Motorogi = same sighting with 2–3 vehicles, off-road positioning. The choice of camp determines the quality of your experience more than the time of year.

destinations.name: Mafia Island
destinations.description: Tanzania's least-known marine park. Whale shark aggregation (October–February), pristine coral reefs, no mass tourism. 45 minutes from Dar es Salaam.
destinations.avoid_reason: Long rains — rough seas, whale sharks absent

entry_requirements.visa: Tanzania visa required. Same as mainland.
entry_requirements.health: Malaria prophylaxis. Yellow fever if from endemic country.
entry_requirements.park_fee: USD 20/person/day for Mafia Marine Park. Whale shark interaction requires permit (included with reputable operators).

airports.name: Mafia Airport
airports.connections: Charter or scheduled from Dar es Salaam (DAR). 30–45 min.

destinations.tim_notes: Mafia is the whale shark destination in East Africa — not the Maldives, not Donsol, not Cancun. 180–200 individual sharks catalogued in Tanzania waters. The island itself is basic — this is not a beach resort destination. It's a diving/snorkelling pilgrimage.

destinations.name: Vietnam
destinations.description: Kim's home country. Hoi An's tailors and restaurants, Ha Long Bay's limestone karsts, Hanoi's French Quarter, Hue's Imperial Citadel. Beyond Paradise covers the luxury tier only.

entry_requirements.visa: E-visa available online. 90-day multiple entry. USD 25.
entry_requirements.health: No mandatory vaccinations for most nationalities. Hepatitis A/B, typhoid recommended.

airports.name: Da Nang International Airport
airports.connections: Direct from Singapore, Bangkok, Kuala Lumpur. Best gateway for Hoi An (30 min transfer)

airports.name: Noi Bai International Airport, Hanoi
airports.connections: Direct flights from Europe, Gulf hubs

airports.name: Tan Son Nhat International Airport, Ho Chi Minh City

destinations.kim_notes: Vietnam's luxury tier is genuinely world-class now — Four Seasons Nam Hai, Six Senses Con Dao, Sofitel Metropole Hanoi are not 'good for Vietnam', they're exceptional by any global standard. The mistake European travelers make is combining too many regions in one trip. Hoi An alone deserves three nights minimum.
